zh.lifeSummary: 當John Wingfield於1305年出生在英國素福爾可文費爾德時，他的父親Sir Lord John de Wingfield I, Lord of Wingfield and Dennington27歲，母親Anne Pêche35歲。他於1325年與Elizabeth Honeypot在英國素福爾可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1358年在英國英格蘭素福爾可文費爾德享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可文費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Wingfield于1305年出生在英国素福爾可文費爾德时，他的父亲Sir Lord John de Wingfield I, Lord of Wingfield and Dennington27岁，母亲Anne Pêche35岁。他于1325年与Elizabeth Honeypot在英国素福爾可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1358年在英国英格兰素福爾可文費爾德享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可文費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Wingfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Winfield
meanings: English: habitational name from Wingfield in Derbyshire, Bedfordshire, Suffolk, and Wiltshire. The Derbyshire placename probably derives from Old English winn ‘pasture, meadow’ + feld ‘open country’. The Bedfordshire placename may derive from Old English wince ‘nook, corner’ + feld. The Suffolk placename may derive from the Old English personal name Wiga + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas (genitive -inga-) or Old English wīg ‘idol’ + feld. The Wiltshire placename derives from the Old English personal name Wina + Old English feld.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Wingfield was born in 1305, in Wingfield, Suffolk, England, his father, Sir Lord John de Wingfield I, Lord of Wingfield and Dennington, was 27 and his mother, Anne Pêche, was 35. He married Elizabeth Honeypot in 1325, in Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1358, in Wingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53, and was buried in Wingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Wingfield est né en 1305, à Wingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Lord John de Wingfield I, Lord of Wingfield and Dennington, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Anne Pêche, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Honeypot en 1325, à Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1358, à Wingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Wingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Wingfield 1305 in Wingfield, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Lord John de Wingfield I, Lord of Wingfield and Dennington 27 und seine Mutter Anne Pêche 35. Er hat 1325 in Suffolk, England Elizabeth Honeypot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1358 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Wingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Wingfield è nato il nel 1305 nel Wingfield, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Sir Lord John de Wingfield I, Lord of Wingfield and Dennington, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Anne Pêche, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Honeypot nel 1325, nel Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1358, nel Wingfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Wingfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Wingfieldが1305年にイギリススフォルクウィングフィールドで生まれた時，父Sir Lord John de Wingfield I, Lord of Wingfield and Denningtonは27歳，母Anne Pêcheは35歳であった。1325年にイギリススフォルクでElizabeth Honeypotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1358年にイギリスイギリススフォルクウィングフィールドで53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクウィングフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Wingfield(이)가 1305년 영국 수폴크 윙필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Lord John de Wingfield I, Lord of Wingfield and Dennington(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Pêche(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1325년 영국 수폴크에서 Elizabeth Honeypot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1358년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 윙필드에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 윙필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Wingfield nasceu em 1305, em Wingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Lord John de Wingfield I, Lord of Wingfield and Dennington, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Anne Pêche, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Honeypot em 1325, em Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1358, em Wingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Wingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Wingfield родился в 1305 г. в местности вингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Lord John de Wingfield I, Lord of Wingfield and Dennington было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Pêche, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Honeypot в 1325 г. в местности суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1358 г. в местности вингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности вингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Wingfield nació en 1305, en Wingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Lord John de Wingfield I, Lord of Wingfield and Dennington, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Anne Pêche, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Honeypot en 1325, en Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1358, en Wingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Wingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
